notes: Issue #15, investigated by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). NO RECIPE AUTHORED — aop.gov.af (Office of the President / Arg) is UNREACHABLE from this host. Evidence: DNS resolves (aop.gov.af -> 149.54.26.219) but NO TCP connection is established at all — ConnectTimeout (WinError 10060) for both the honest bot UA and a browser UA, still failing at a 90s timeout. That is a connect-level failure, not an HTTP block: the site is either dead/offline or geo-fenced (same taxonomy slot as pak_pmo, which takes no TCP from outside the country). A user_agent override cannot help. Worth one retry from a different network before concluding it is permanently dead. WAYBACK IS THE VIABLE ROUTE: CDX for aop.gov.af/* returns ~3885 statuscode:200 captures spanning 2015-2026 (2016:291, 2017:1990, 2018:365, 2019:595, 2021:944, 2025:460), i.e. good coverage of the Ghani presidency through the Aug-2021 transition — high value, since this era is otherwise hard to source. Archived paths: /dr/news (206), /dr/news_details (203), /dr/information_details (245), /dari/<id>, plus a query-style pager ?s=dari&c=news_dr&pg=N. RECOMMEND a follow-up afg_aop_wayback.yml; note the /dr/ (Dari) tree is the fullest and an English tree (?s=english&c=news) also exists — archived-layout selectors and the exact article shape still need to be determined. country=Afghanistan; source_url=https://aop.gov.af/; source_name=aop.gov.af; source_type=official_gov; region=Asia; iso3n=4; content_format=fulltext.
